github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: CRITICAL: Always write commit messages in English only. Never use Chinese or any other language. Follow Conventional Commits format strictly: <type>(<scope>): <subject>. Types: feat, fix, refactor, test, docs, ci, style, perf, chore. Subject: imperative mood, lowercase, max 50 chars, no period. Example: feat(backtest): add DCA strategy support
